typography.rules: H1 max text-5xl to text-6xl with tracking-tighter. Use JetBrains Mono for overlines/labels with uppercase and tracking-[0.2em].

colors.rules: Primary accent is Lime Green (#CCFF00). Use sparingly for CTAs, neon glow effects, and interactive states. Background is Deep Obsidian. No full-screen gradients.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing. Asymmetric bento grids. Overlapping elements to simulate stacked paper.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Use 1px borders for Neo-Brutalist structure. Implement CSS clip-path for torn 'paper model' edges on hero images and feature cards.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard shadows with neon lime glow (e.g., hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#CCFF00]). Use -translate-y-1 for lift.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer Motion for entrance staggering. react-fast-marquee for slow kinetic editorial ribbons.

sections.name: Hero
sections.design_instructions: Oversized typography 'ROHITH PULI'. Kinetic marquee text running behind reading 'MOTION GRAPHIC DESIGNER'. Profile image should have a torn paper mask (clip-path).

sections.name: About Me
sections.design_instructions: Bento grid layout. Section for details, skills, and tools. Display tools used (After Effects, Premiere, etc.) as raw technical tags using JetBrains Mono.

sections.name: Projects
sections.design_instructions: Moving frames carousel. Use Swiper or Framer Motion to create horizontal scrolling frames. Style the frames like torn paper film strips with neon green accents.

sections.name: Gallery
sections.design_instructions: Full visibility masonry or dense bento grid. Showcase images and provide video placeholders. Hovering over a gallery item reveals a lime green overlay with project title.

sections.name: Resume
sections.design_instructions: Cool timeline or brutalist ticket-style design. Dashed vertical lines with glowing neon lime nodes. Include downloadable resume button.

sections.name: Lucky Wheel of Discount
sections.design_instructions: Gamified interaction for clients. A circular SVG/CSS wheel with conic-gradient slices (Lime green and charcoal). Central 'SPIN' button. Neon border glow.

sections.name: Contact & Admin Auth
sections.design_instructions: Brutalist contact form (solid borders, square corners). Include a 'Google Login for Admin' button at the bottom or in a hidden footer route for editing access.

packages_to_install: yarn add framer-motion react-fast-marquee swiper lucide-react
components_and_libraries.rules: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for creative structural layouts. Use Shadcn ONLY for interactive logic (Form, Input, Dialog) and customize them heavily to remove the Vercel-look.

hero_profile.description: Hero section portrait of Rohith under neon lighting

backgrounds.description: Dark textured paper background. Use as section divider or body background texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT ASK ME FOR ANY CLARIFICATION. JUST BUILD.
Rely entirely on the provided image_urls. Do not use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com. If you need a video placeholder, style an HTML5 video tag with a poster image from the gallery.
Implement the 'paper model' effect using CSS `clip-path: polygon(...)` to create slightly jagged, torn edges on cards and images.
Ensure all interactive elements and form fields have a `data-testid` attribute.
Strictly follow the color palette. Neon Lime (#CCFF00) should be highly visible against the dark #0B0B0D background.
